mapper.sql: id, login_name loginName, password, real_name realName, job, sex, phone, email, status, create_date createDate, update_date updateDate
mapper.select:
select
from t_user
login_name like concat('%', #{loginName}, '%')
or real_name like concat('%', #{realName}, '%')
or phone like concat('%', #{phone}, '%')
order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into t_user (login_name, password, real_name, job, sex, phone, email, status, create_date, update_date) values (#{loginName}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{job}, #{sex}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{status}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update t_user set login_name = #{loginName}, password = #{password}, real_name = #{realName}, job = #{job}, sex = #{sex}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, status = #{status}, update_date = now() where id = #{id}
